# PlainCars — NHTSA Vehicle Safety Data

> PlainCars provides free access to NHTSA vehicle safety data including consumer complaints, recall campaigns, and crash test ratings.

## Data Sources
- NHTSA ODI Complaints — Consumer-submitted vehicle safety complaints
- NHTSA Recall Campaigns — Official safety recall data
- NCAP Safety Ratings — Crash test star ratings

## Site Structure
- /make — Browse all vehicle makes
- /make/[make] — Models for a specific make
- /make/[make]/[model] — All years for a model
- /make/[make]/[model]-[year] — Year-specific safety data
- /rankings — Most complained and most dangerous vehicles
- /recall — Recent recall campaigns
- /search — Search vehicles by make/model

## Data Details
- 70 major vehicle makes
- 3,585 models
- 21,000+ model years
- 450,000+ individual complaints
- Complaint data from NHTSA bulk files, updated periodically
- Recall data from NHTSA API
- Safety ratings from NCAP crash tests

## Contact
- Website: https://plaincars.com
- About: https://plaincars.com/about
